brief: ChoiceGrid · global design layer redesign — food-bank allocation control tower. Scope was deliberately limited to tokens/type/atmosphere/motion; the schematic map's cartography and ~119 hardcoded light tints were left light on purpose (AGENTS.md rule 9 — the map is load-bearing for the judged demo). A full dark inversion remains available but requires tokenizing those values and redrawing the map ground.
